title: Lugano hosts the Swiss Pride festival
description: In June 2018 Switzerland's national Pride took place in Lugano, bringing the event to the Italian-speaking canton of Ticino.

title: Pink Cross marks its 25th anniversary
description: The Swiss national gay umbrella organization Pink Cross celebrated 25 years of existence, starting with a reception at the Lugano Pride on 1 June 2018 and closing with a gala evening in Bern on 15 September.

title: Swiss National Council backs adding sexual orientation to the anti-racism norm
description: On 25 September 2018 the National Council, the lower chamber of the Swiss parliament, voted to extend the criminal provision against racial discrimination to cover sexual orientation and gender identity, a step in the legislative process toward broader anti-discrimination protection.

title: Kathrin Bertschy receives the Tolerantia Award Schweiz
description: On 5 October 2018 Pink Cross honored National Councillor Kathrin Bertschy of the Green Liberal Party with the Tolerantia Award Schweiz, presented at the award ceremony in Paris, for her sustained work for the LGBT community; in 2013 she had launched the parliamentary initiative for marriage for all.

title: Swiss parliament turns down the anti-discrimination extension
description: On 3 December 2018 the Council of States rejected the extension of the anti-racism criminal provision, and the full parliament then did the same, setting back the effort to add sexual orientation and gender identity to the norm.

title: Bern's HAB group takes the name hab queer bern
description: At their annual assembly on 22 May 2019, the Homosexuelle Arbeitsgruppen Bern (HAB) renamed themselves hab queer bern, signalling openness to people who do not identify as homosexual.

title: Swiss Federal Supreme Court excludes sexual orientation from equality-law protection
description: On 30 April 2019 the Federal Supreme Court dismissed the complaint of a gay soldier whose employment was ended despite an excellent record, holding that discrimination based on sexual orientation falls outside the scope of the Gender Equality Act.

title: hab queer bern counseling service moves to Checkpoint Bern
description: In May 2019 the professional counseling service of hab queer bern was transferred to Checkpoint Bern, securing its financing.

title: Zurich Pride celebrates its 25th edition and 50 years of Stonewall
description: From 14 to 16 June 2019 Zurich held its 25th Pride under the motto Strong in Diversity, commemorating the 50th anniversary of the Stonewall riots. The festival was staged on Sechseläutenplatz and in the Bürkliplatz grounds for the first time.

title: Basel marches to remember Stonewall
description: On 29 June 2019 Basel held a Remember Stonewall march marking 50 years since the New York riots.

title: Geneva hosts the Swiss Pride festival
description: In July 2019 the national Pride took place in Geneva.

title: National Council committee endorses marriage for all
description: On 30 August 2019 the legal affairs committee of the Swiss National Council voted 17 to 7 in favor of opening marriage to same-sex couples, while narrowly opposing, 13 to 12, access to sperm donation and joint parenthood from birth for female couples.

title: European Tolerantia Award ceremony held in Switzerland for the first time
description: On 5 October 2019 the European Tolerantia Award ceremony took place in Switzerland for the first time. The Swiss award went to Henry Hohmann, a co-founder of Transgender Network Switzerland.

title: QueerBienne association founded in Biel
description: In 2019 the association QueerBienne was founded in the bilingual city of Biel/Bienne, creating a local queer organization for the region.
